tasks.dev: npm run build:renderer && deno desktop --hmr --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net src/deno/main.ts
tasks.test: deno task check && npm run build:renderer
tasks.build:windows:msi: deno task build:renderer && deno desktop --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net --backend webview --compress=xz --icon ./assets/app.ico --include dist/renderer --include public --include assets --include config.json --include package.json --exclude node_modules --output ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Windows-x64.msi src/deno/main.ts
tasks.build:linux: deno task build:linux:appimage && deno task clean:desktop-staging ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64 && deno task build:linux:deb && deno task clean:desktop-staging ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64 && deno task build:linux:rpm && deno task clean:desktop-staging ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64
tasks.build:linux:appimage: deno task build:renderer && deno desktop --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net --backend webview --compress=xz --icon ./assets/linux-icons/512x512.png --include dist/renderer --include public --include assets --include config.json --include package.json --exclude node_modules --output ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64.AppImage src/deno/main.ts
tasks.build:linux:deb: deno task build:renderer && deno desktop --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net --backend webview --compress=xz --icon ./assets/linux-icons/512x512.png --include dist/renderer --include public --include assets --include config.json --include package.json --exclude node_modules --output ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64.deb src/deno/main.ts
tasks.build:linux:rpm: deno task build:renderer && deno desktop --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net --backend webview --compress=xz --icon ./assets/linux-icons/512x512.png --include dist/renderer --include public --include assets --include config.json --include package.json --exclude node_modules --output ./dist/desktop/Aero-P2P-Chat-Linux-x64.rpm src/deno/main.ts
tasks.build:all-targets: deno task build:renderer && deno desktop --all-targets --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --allow-net --backend webview --compress=xz --icon ./assets/linux-icons/512x512.png --include dist/renderer --include public --include assets --include config.json --include package.json --exclude node_modules src/deno/main.ts
tasks.build:all: deno task build:windows && deno task build:linux
